headline: What is the impact of oil shock scenarios on fixed-income markets
summary: Investing.com – Oil shock scenarios stemming from disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz could have wide-ranging consequences for global markets, with Europe likely to bear the brunt of the impact, according to UBS.

headline: Iran war is having negative effects on both restaurant demand and supply, analyst
summary: Investing.com -- Fast-food giants McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) and Restaurant Brands International Inc (NYSE:QSR) are navigating a complex operating environment as the ongoing war in Iran begins to weigh on global demand and supply chains.

headline: Colgate Lawsuits Put Mouth Rinse Labels And Oral Care Story In Focus
summary: Colgate-Palmolive, NYSE:CL, is facing lawsuits alleging misleading packaging for certain mouth rinse products. A federal judge has allowed two separate cases to move forward, following earlier packaging changes agreed with regulators. The claims focus on mouth rinse labeling and are distinct from prior toothpaste related matters. For investors watching Colgate-Palmolive, NYSE:CL, this legal update comes at a time when the shares trade around $84.29 and recent returns have been mixed. The...
